title: Kadhal Valarthaen Lyrics Manmadhan

kadhal valarthaen

kadhal valarthaen

ye pull pulla
una enga pudichen

ye pulla.

ennai unmanam ariyaadhaa

pozhiyaadhaa.

pala kodi pengalthaan
boomiyile vazhalaam

oru paarvaiyaal

eunakenave kathirundhaale
kaaladiyil vergalum
mulaikkum

inbam thaane, maane..

unadhu per ezhudhu pakkathula
enadhu peyarai naanum
ezhudhi vechchen

adhu mazhayil nanaiyaama
kuda pudichen.
mazhai vittum naan
nananjen..

ye pull pulla

kadhal valarthaen..

unnai thavira ingu
enaku yaaradi
unnadhu nizhaliye
oaiveduppen

unadhu swasathin
soodu theendinaal
maranam vandhu naan
uyirthezhuven

un mugathai paarkkave
en vizhigal vazhudhe
piriyum nerathil paarvai
izhakkiren naanadi

udal porul aavi enaithum
unakenave tharuven penne
unnarugil vazhthaal
podhum kannae kannae

thandhi anbu adhu
pirakkum varai.
thaaiyin anbu adhu
valarum varai

thozhi oruthi varum
tharum anbo
uyirodu vazhum varai
adiye ye pulla pulla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Valarthaen?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of nurturing a deep romantic connection.

Who composed the music for Manmadhan?

The music for Manmadhan was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What role does the song play in the movie Manmadhan?

The song underscores the protagonist's emotional journey and his deep feelings for his love interest.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kadhal Valarthaen?

The lyrics were penned by Na Muthukumar.

When was the movie Manmadhan released?

The movie Manmadhan was released in 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Manmadhan, Kadhal Valarthaen is a poignant melody that beautifully captures the protagonist's deep emotions and longing for love. Sung by KK, the song's soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar evoke a sense of romantic yearning. Yuvan Shankar Raja's composition adds a layer of emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. The song conveys the nurturing and growing nature of love, resonating with anyone who has experienced profound affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kadhal Valarthaen from the movie Manmadhan, where KK's soulful voice meets Yuvan Shankar Raja's mesmerizing music. This romantic track, penned by Na Muthukumar, beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of emotions with this unforgettable Tamil classic.
stanzaMeanings: I nurtured love, I nurtured love, I nurtured love for you, my dear.
I nurtured love, I nurtured love, building a nest inside my soul, I nurtured love.
Inside my heart, dear, I planted a seed and nurtured it.
Today, as it blooms into a flower, I nurtured love.
I found you, my dear, I discovered you.
I found you in my eyes, I engraved you in my heart, my dear.
I nurtured love, I nurtured love, I nurtured love for you, my dear.
I nurtured love, I nurtured love, building a nest inside my soul, I nurtured love.
The wind knows the flower, doesn't your heart know me? When the clouds see you, don't they pour down?
Many millions of women may live on this earth.
With just one look, you stole my heart, dear.
I waited for you, even roots will grow at my feet, in love there is both pain and joy, dear.
I wrote your name next to mine.
I found an umbrella to stay dry in the rain, but I still got wet.
I found you, my dear, I discovered you.
I nurtured love...
Who else do I have here besides you, my dear? I will follow your shadow.
If your breath touches me, even if death comes, I will come back to life.
Just looking at your face, my eyes melt, at the time of parting, I lose my sight, dear.
I will give you my body, my possessions, my soul, dear, just being near you is enough, dear.
Until love is born, until a mother's love grows.
A friend's love will last as long as life does.
Oh dear, my dear.
I nurtured love, I nurtured love, I nurtured love for you, my dear.
I nurtured love, I nurtured love, building a nest inside my soul, I nurtured love.
Inside my heart, dear, I planted a seed and nurtured it.
Today, as it blooms into a flower, I nurtured love.
I found you, my dear, I discovered you.
I found you in my eyes, I engraved you in my heart, my dear.
